summary: Complete v5 implementation plan for Video Prompt Pipeline. Key v5 changes: (1) Step 3 now uses 2-Phase Chain-of-Thought: Phase 1 synthesizes one visual_event from entire sequence text, Phase 2 creates camera cuts as different angles of that event, (2) matched_text replaced with audio_sync — marks where voiceover is, does NOT dictate visuals, (3) Anti 1:1 translation rule explicitly forbids sentence-to-scene mapping, (4) Montage handling: director picks 1-2 strongest visual moments, no need to cover every sentence, (5) Step 2 = 2 API calls with Pro model, (6) Final JSON keeps character_labels, art style, negative prompt, constraints.
